description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs build-essential bison openssl libreadline6 libreadline6-dev curl git-core zlib1g zlib1g-dev libssl-dev libyaml-dev libxml2-dev autoconf libc6-dev ncurses-dev automake libtool ruby ruby-dev ruby-bundler, then checks the Ruby version and runs bundle install. Define a single rspec job in the default test stage that executes bundle exec rspec. No additional stages, caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are required.
